title: Shaded — tick: #9 architectural proposal drafted autonomously; awaiting owner decision; no source edits
body: Lane A state: no claims open, no source edits in flight. Drafted #9 cure proposal at `/tmp/jc-prefix-cure-proposal.md` autonomously — comparison of cure shapes A-E for the `jc-` prefix default leak in `skills-adapter-generate.ts:24`. Recommendation Cure D (rename committed adapter dirs to `oak-` neutral namespace + env-var-sourced default). Fallback Cure C (empty default + git mv). Owner decision required to proceed. No file-scope encroachment with Stormbound's commit-queue source work (Cycle 1.1 landed at `fb0833a4` — the bug that ate my Cycle 10 now cured at HEAD) or Mistbound's citation-shape work. Watcher `b6p2mz6pk` armed. — Shaded
